Description: Verify admin user can login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid admin email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to admin dashboard with full access

Description: Verify manager user can login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid manager email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to manager dashboard

Description: Verify dealer user can login with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid dealer email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to dealer dashboard

Description: Verify system rejects invalid login attempts
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter incorrect password
4. Click Login button
Expected Result: System displays error message and login is denied

Description: Verify account locks after 5 failed login attempts
Test Steps:
1. Attempt login with wrong password 5 times
2. Try to login with correct password
Expected Result: Account is locked for 5 minutes and error message is displayed

Description: Verify JWT token is generated and valid after successful login
Test Steps:
1. Login with valid credentials
2. Check response headers/body for JWT token
3. Verify token expiration is 30 minutes
Expected Result: Valid JWT token is generated with 30-minute expiration

Description: Verify admin can access all system modules
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to user management
2. Navigate to dealer management
3. Navigate to analytics
4. Navigate to audit logs
Expected Result: Admin has access to all modules without restrictions

Description: Verify manager can access only authorized modules
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to access admin-only features
2. Access dealer management
3. Access analytics for assigned dealers
Expected Result: Manager can access authorized modules only and is denied admin features

Description: Verify dealer can access only their dealership data
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to access other dealership data
2. Access own dealership inventory
3. Attempt to access admin features
Expected Result: Dealer can only view/modify their own dealership data

Test Case Name: Create sales order with available vehicle
Description: Verify sales order can be created with available vehicle
Preconditions: Dealer logged in and vehicle available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to sales module
2. Click Create Order
3. Fill customer details
4. Select available vehicle
5. Enter payment details
6. Submit order
Expected Result: Sales order is created successfully and vehicle status changes to Sold

Test Case Name: Prevent sales order with unavailable vehicle
Description: Verify system prevents order creation with sold/reserved vehicle
Preconditions: Dealer logged in and vehicle not available
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to sales module
2. Attempt to create order with sold vehicle
Expected Result: System displays error and prevents order creation

Description: Verify vehicle status updates correctly
Preconditions: Dealer logged in with vehicles in inventory
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to inventory
2. Select a vehicle
3. Change status from Available to Sold
4. Save changes
Expected Result: Vehicle status is updated successfully in database

Description: Verify service appointment can be scheduled
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to service module
2. Click Schedule Appointment
3. Select vehicle
4. Choose date and time
5. Select service type
6. Submit
Expected Result: Service appointment is created successfully with scheduled status

Description: Verify payment transaction is recorded correctly
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to finance module
2. Select pending order
3. Enter payment amount
4. Select payment method
5. Process payment
Expected Result: Payment is recorded and order status updates to Completed

Description: Verify admin can create new dealer
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to dealer management
2. Click Add Dealer
3. Fill dealer details (name location contact)
4. Assign manager
5. Submit
Expected Result: New dealer is created successfully and appears in dealer list

Description: Verify manager can be assigned to dealership
Preconditions: Admin logged in and dealer exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to dealer management
2. Select dealer
3. Click Assign Manager
4. Select manager from list
5. Save
Expected Result: Manager is assigned successfully to dealer

Description: Verify vehicle can be added to dealer inventory
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to inventory
2. Click Add Vehicle
3. Select KIA car model
4. Enter vehicle details (color variant price)
5. Submit
Expected Result: Vehicle is added successfully to dealer inventory

Description: Verify customer lead can be created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to leads module
2. Click Add Lead
3. Enter customer details
4. Select interested vehicle
5. Enter lead source
6. Submit
Expected Result: Lead is created successfully with New status

Description: Verify lead can be converted to sales order
Preconditions: Dealer logged in and qualified lead exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to leads
2. Select qualified lead
3. Click Convert to Sale
4. Fill order details
5. Submit
Expected Result: Lead status changes to Converted and sales order is created

Description: Verify test drive can be scheduled for lead
Preconditions: Dealer logged in and lead exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to leads
2. Select lead
3. Click Schedule Test Drive
4. Select vehicle
5. Choose date and time
6. Submit
Expected Result: Test drive is scheduled successfully

Description: Verify parts purchase order can be created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to parts module
2. Click Create Purchase Order
3. Select parts
4. Enter quantities
5. Enter supplier details
6. Submit
Expected Result: Purchase order is created successfully

Description: Verify parts inventory updates on receipt
Preconditions: Dealer logged in and purchase order exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to parts
2. Select purchase order
3. Mark as received
4. Update quantities
Expected Result: Parts inventory is updated with received quantities

Description: Verify sales report generates correctly
Preconditions: Manager logged in with sales data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to analytics
2. Select Sales Report
3. Choose date range
4. Select dealership
5. Generate report
Expected Result: Sales report displays accurate data for selected period

Description: Verify dealer performance dashboard displays correctly
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to analytics
2. View dealer performance
3. Check sales count revenue conversion rate
Expected Result: Dashboard displays accurate performance metrics for all dealers

Test Case Name: Audit log creation on data modification
Description: Verify audit log is created for all CRUD operations
Test Steps:
1. Create/Update/Delete any entity
2. Navigate to audit logs
3. Search for recent action
Expected Result: Audit log entry is created with user timestamp action and entity details

Description: Verify soft delete marks records as deleted without removal
Test Steps:
1. Delete a dealer/vehicle/order
2. Check database
3. Verify record still exists with is_deleted=true
Expected Result: Record is marked as deleted but not physically removed from database

Description: Verify user session expires after 30 minutes of inactivity
Test Steps:
1. Login successfully
2. Wait 30 minutes without activity
3. Attempt to perform action
Expected Result: Session expires and user is redirected to login page

Description: Verify passwords are stored encrypted using BCrypt
Test Steps:
1. Create new user
2. Check database users table
3. Verify password field
Expected Result: Password is stored as BCrypt hash not plain text

Description: Verify system is protected against SQL injection attacks
Test Steps:
1. Enter SQL injection code in email field
2. Submit login form
Expected Result: System sanitizes input and prevents SQL injection

Description: Verify all API endpoints require valid JWT token
Test Steps:
1. Call protected API endpoint without token
2. Call with invalid token
3. Call with valid token
Expected Result: Endpoints reject requests without valid token and accept with valid token
